```{r fittedMeanPEFPPlots}
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (SMR)", y = "mean sev.",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                       aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$fittedVals), max(plotData$fittedVals))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## these affect via nu/tau
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "Severity ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanPEFplot9 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ isForest",
       x = "", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))


legPlot <- get_legend(meanPEFplot1 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "meanSevPEFPlots_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 13, width = 13,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(meanPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #decid
          meanPEFplot6 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #flamconif
          meanPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #lari
          meanPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #SMR 
          meanPEFplot9 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #isForest
          meanPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #CTI
          meanPEFplot7 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #SRR
          meanPEFplot8,  #buffer_30m
          meanPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #buffer_960m
          nrow = 3, ncol = 3, 
          legend.grob = legPlot,
          font.label = list(size = 16), 
          legend = "bottom")
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on mu - forest pixels
Note that "mu" is the fitted mean of values in (0,1)
Showing partial effects in forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
```{r fittedMuPEFPPlots}
## mu
vars <- expand.grid(UNDERSTOREY = c(FALSE, TRUE), HEIGH_LOWER = quantile(na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER), probs = c(0.05, 0.50, 0.95)))
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = TRUE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

muPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       x = "% cover", y = expression(mu), 
       linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Lari",
       x = "% cover", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = muPred)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (SMR)", y = expression(mu), 
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                     aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

legPlot <- get_legend(muPEFplot1 + 
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical"))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "muSevPEFPlots_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(muPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #decid
          muPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #lari
          muPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #SMR
          muPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #CTI
          muPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #buffer_960m
          as_ggplot(legPlot),
          nrow = 3, ncol = 2, 
          font.label = list(size = 16), 
          legend = "none")
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on variance - forest pixels
Showing partial effects in forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
Note that because $\mu$ and $\sigma$ both influence the variance, we need to plot it against all $\mu$ and $\sigma$ covariates.
```{r VarYPEFPlots}
## variance - sigma covariates
## this plot includes the effect of height from mu and tau
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = TRUE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

varPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       y = "Expected variance",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## the following also includes effect via nu
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot2 <-  ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = varY)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ moisture (SMR)",
       y = "Expected variance",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_1920m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_1920m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                      aes(x = buffer_1920m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_1920m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_1920m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (1920m)",
       y = "Expected variance", 
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - mu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## includes effect of height from tau
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = TRUE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

varPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ Lari * Height", y = "Expected variance",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                      aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - nu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot9 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "Expected variance",
       linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - tau covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varPEFplot10 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = varY)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ isForest",
       x = "", y = "Expected variance", shape = "understorey")

legPlot <- get_legend(varPEFplot1 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "varSevPEFPlots_DAfires_sevModels1.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  varPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #Decid
  varPEFplot7 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #FlamConif
  varPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #Lari
  varPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #smr
  varPEFplot10 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #isForest
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 2,  
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "none",
  font.label = list(size = 16)
)
dev.off()

legPlot <- get_legend(varPEFplot4 + 
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))
png(file.path(figDir, "varSevPEFPlots_DAfires_sevModels2.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  varPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #cti
  varPEFplot8 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #SurfReliefRatio
  varPEFplot9 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_30m
  varPEFplot6 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_960m
  varPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_1920m
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 2,  
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "none",
  font.label = list(size = 16)
)
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on probabilities at 0 and 1 - non-forest pixels
Showing partial effects in non-forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
Note that because $\nu$ and $\tau$ influence both *p0* and *p1* we need to plot them against all $\nu$ and $\tau$ covariates.
```{r p0p1PEFPlotsNonForest}
cols <- c("SEV_PROP", "Decid", "HEIGHT_LOWER", "CTI", "Lari", "SMR_wet",
          "buffer_960m", "FIRE_NAME", "UNDERSTOREY", "buffer_1920m", "buffer_30m",
          "FlamConif", "PctSlope", "SurfAspectRatio", "SurfReliefRatio", "isForest")
## 0 probs - nu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "p0 ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = p0)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ moisture (SMR)",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## 0 probs - tau covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = p0)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ isForest",
       x = "", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

vars <- expand.grid(UNDERSTOREY = c(FALSE, TRUE), HEIGH_LOWER = quantile(na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER), probs = c(0.05, 0.50, 0.95)))
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

p0NFPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))


plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

p0NFPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ Lari * Height",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p0NFPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = p0)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p0 ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

legPlot <- get_legend(p0NFPEFplot6 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## override scale for clarity
## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "p0PEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 13, width = 13,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  p0NFPEFplot6 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #Decid
  p0NFPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #Flamconif
  p0NFPEFplot7 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #Lari
  p0NFPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #SMR
  p0NFPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #isForest
  p0NFPEFplot8 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #CTI
  p0NFPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.10)), #SRR
  p0NFPEFplot4, #buffer_30m
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 3,
  font.label = list(size = 16),
  legend = "none")
dev.off()

## 1 probs - tau covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = p1)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ isForest",
       x = "", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

vars <- expand.grid(UNDERSTOREY = c(FALSE, TRUE), HEIGH_LOWER = quantile(na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER), probs = c(0.05, 0.50, 0.95)))
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

p1NFPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))


plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

p1NFPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ Lari * Height",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                       aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = p1)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "p1 ~ moisture (SMR)",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")


## 1 probs - nu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
p1NFPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = p1)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "p1 ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

legPlot <- get_legend(p1NFPEFplot2 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "p1PEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 13, width = 13,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  p1NFPEFplot2, #Decid
  p1NFPEFplot8, #Flamconif 
  p1NFPEFplot3, #Lari
  p1NFPEFplot7, #SMR
  p1NFPEFplot1, #isForest
  p1NFPEFplot4, #CTI
  p1NFPEFplot5, #SRR
  p1NFPEFplot6, #buffer_30m
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 3,
  font.label = list(size = 16),
  legend = "none")
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on mean - non-forest pixels
Showing partial effects in non-forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
Note that because $\mu$, $\nu$ and $\tau$ influence the expected mean, it has to be plot against all $\mu$, $\nu$ and $\tau$ covariates.
```{r fittedMeanPEFPPlotsNonForest}
## mean
vars <- expand.grid(UNDERSTOREY = c(FALSE, TRUE), HEIGH_LOWER = quantile(na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER), probs = c(0.05, 0.50, 0.95)))
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

meanNFPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$fittedVals), max(plotData$fittedVals))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       x = "% cover", y = "mean sev.", 
       linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$fittedVals), max(plotData$fittedVals))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

meanNFPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$fittedVals), max(plotData$fittedVals))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Lari",
       x = "% cover", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (SMR)", y = "mean sev.",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                         aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$fittedVals), max(plotData$fittedVals))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## these affect via nu/tau
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "Severity ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
meanNFPEFplot9 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = fittedVals)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ isForest",
       x = "", y = "mean sev.", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))


legPlot <- get_legend(meanNFPEFplot1 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "meanSevPEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 13, width = 13,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(meanNFPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #Decid
          meanNFPEFplot6 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #Flamconif
          meanNFPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #Lari
          meanNFPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #SMR  
          meanNFPEFplot9 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #isForest
          meanNFPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #CTI
          meanNFPEFplot7 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)), #SRR
          meanNFPEFplot8, #buffer_30m
          meanNFPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.6, 1)), #buffer_960m
          nrow = 3, ncol = 3, 
          legend.grob = legPlot,
          font.label = list(size = 16), 
          legend = "bottom")
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on mu - non-forest pixels
Note that "mu" is the fitted mean of values in (0,1)
Showing partial effects in non-forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
```{r fittedMuPEFPPlotsNonForest}
## mean
vars <- expand.grid(UNDERSTOREY = c(FALSE, TRUE), HEIGH_LOWER = quantile(na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER), probs = c(0.05, 0.50, 0.95)))
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

muNFPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       x = "% cover", y = expression(mu), 
       linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muNFPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muNFPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ Lari",
       x = "% cover", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muNFPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = muPred)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ moisture (SMR)", y = expression(mu),
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
muNFPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                       aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = muPred)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$muPred), max(plotData$muPred))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Severity ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = expression(mu), linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

legPlot <- get_legend(muNFPEFplot1 + 
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical"))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "muSevPEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(muNFPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #Decid
          muNFPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #Lari
          muNFPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #SMR
          muNFPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #CTI
          muNFPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.6)), #buffer_960m
          as_ggplot(legPlot),
          nrow = 3, ncol = 2, 
          font.label = list(size = 16), 
          legend = "none")
dev.off()
```

#### Partial effects on variance - non-forest pixels
Showing partial effects in non-forested pixels only, except when isForest was significant
Note that because $\mu$ and $\sigma$ both influence the variance, we need to plot it against all $\mu$ and $\sigma$ covariates.
```{r VarYPEFPlotsNonForest}
## variance - sigma covariates
## this plot includes the effect of height from mu
plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Decid", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y,  "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

varNFPEFplot1 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Decid * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Decid, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ Broadleaf * Height",
       y = "Expected variance",
       x = "% cover", linetype = "understorey", colour = "height") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))


plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SMR_wet",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot2 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(SMR_wet), y = varY)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not wet/aquatic", "TRUE" = "wet/aquatic")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ moisture (SMR)", y = "Expected variance",
       x = "", shape = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_1920m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_1920m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot3 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                        aes(x = buffer_1920m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_1920m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_1920m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (1920m)",
       y = "Expected variance", 
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - mu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "CTI",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot4 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = CTI * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$CTI, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ moisture (CTI)",
       x = "CTI", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- mapply(FUN = function(x, y) {
  DT <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "Lari", 
                   fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = x, "HEIGHT_LOWER" = y, "isForest" = FALSE))
  DT$UNDERSTOREY <- x
  DT$HEIGHT_LOWER <- y
  DT
},
x = vars$UNDERSTOREY, y = vars$HEIGH_LOWER, SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
plotData <- rbindlist(plotData)

varNFPEFplot5 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = Lari * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$Lari, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY), 
                colour = as.factor(HEIGHT_LOWER * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$HEIGHT_LOWER, "scaled:center"))), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +  
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ Lari",
       x = "% cover", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_960m",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE,  "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot6 <- ggplot(plotData, 
                        aes(x = buffer_960m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_960m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(min(plotData$varY), max(plotData$varY))) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (960m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - nu covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "FlamConif",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot7 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = FlamConif * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$FlamConif, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() +
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ FlamConif",
       x = "% cover", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "SurfReliefRatio", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot8 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = SurfReliefRatio * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$SurfReliefRatio, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ roughness (SRR)",
       x = "% roughness", y = "Expected variance", linetype = "understorey")

plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "buffer_30m", 
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE, "isForest" = FALSE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot9 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = buffer_30m * attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:scale") + attr(modelDataFULLScaled$buffer_30m, "scaled:center"), y = varY)) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), lineend = "round", size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ neigh. burns (30m)",
       x = "prop. neigh. burnt", y = "Expected variance",
       linetype = "understorey") +
  guides(linetype = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = "black")))

## variance - tau covariates
plotData <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest", 
                       fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = FALSE))
plotData2 <- PEFwrapper(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, modelDataFULLScaled, term = "isForest",
                        fixed.at = list("UNDERSTOREY" = TRUE))
plotData$UNDERSTOREY <- FALSE
plotData2$UNDERSTOREY <- TRUE
plotData <- rbind(plotData, plotData2)
varNFPEFplot10 <- ggplot(plotData, aes(x = as.factor(isForest), y = varY)) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("FALSE" = "not forest", "TRUE" = "forest")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,1)) +
  theme_pubr() + 
  labs(title = "Var(Severity) ~ isForest",
       x = "", y = "Expected variance", shape = "understorey")

legPlot <- get_legend(varNFPEFplot1 + 
                        geom_point(aes(shape = as.factor(UNDERSTOREY)), size = 2) +
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))

## order follows veg, moisture, forest, topo and neighbourhood
png(file.path(figDir, "varSevPEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels1.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  varNFPEFplot1 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #Decid
  varNFPEFplot7 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #FlamConif
  varNFPEFplot5 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #Lari
  varNFPEFplot2 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #smr
  varNFPEFplot10 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #isForest
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 2,  
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "none",
  font.label = list(size = 16)
)
dev.off()

legPlot <- get_legend(varNFPEFplot4 + 
                        theme(legend.box = "vertical") +
                        labs(shape = "understorey") +
                        guides(linetype = guide_legend(order = 1),
                               shape = guide_legend(order = 2)))
png(file.path(figDir, "varSevPEFPlotsNotForest_DAfires_sevModels2.png"), height = 10, width = 10,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  varNFPEFplot4 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #cti
  varNFPEFplot8 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #SurfReliefRatio
  varNFPEFplot9 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_30m
  varNFPEFplot6 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_960m
  varNFPEFplot3 + scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.25)), #buffer_1920m
  as_ggplot(legPlot),
  nrow = 3, ncol = 2,  
  common.legend = TRUE, legend = "none",
  font.label = list(size = 16)
)
dev.off()
```


#### Maps of observed and predicted severity
```{r sevMaps}
cols <- c("SEV_PROP", "Decid", "HEIGHT_LOWER", "CTI", "Lari", "SMR_wet",
          "buffer_960m", "FIRE_NAME", "UNDERSTOREY", "buffer_1920m", "buffer_30m",
          "FlamConif", "SurfReliefRatio", "isForest", "pixID",
          "SEV_CLASS", "Lat", "Long")

modelDataFULLScaled <- summaryABSK_AllData[, ..cols]
cols2scale <- c("Decid", "HEIGHT_LOWER", "CTI", "Lari", "buffer_960m",
                "buffer_1920m", "buffer_30m", "FlamConif", 
                "SurfReliefRatio")
modelDataFULLScaled[, (cols2scale) := lapply(.SD, scale), .SDcols = cols2scale]

modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled <- readRDS("analyses/modelNgbSev4FULL4Scaled.rds")

predictionsDT <- na.omit(modelDataFULLScaled)[, .(SEV_PROP, SEV_CLASS, pixID, FIRE_NAME, Lat, Long)]
predData <- predictAll(modelNgbSev4FULL4_Scaled, type = "response")
predictionsDT[, `:=`(predSEV_PROP = calcMeanBEINF(predData$mu, predData$nu, predData$tau),
                     p1 = calcP1BEINF(predData$nu, predData$tau),
                     varY = calcVarBEINF(predData$mu, predData$sigma, predData$nu, predData$tau))]
rm(predData, modelDataFULLScaled)

## make severity rasters
firePoints <- predictionsDT[, .(pixID, SEV_PROP, predSEV_PROP, p1, varY, FIRE_NAME, Lat, Long)]
firePoints <- st_as_sf(firePoints, coords = c("Long", "Lat"),
                       agr = "constant", crs = crsProj) |> 
  vect()

## select 2 fires with high agreement between predictions and observations
## correlation between pred and obs severity by fire.
fires2mapHighAgreement <- (predictionsDT[, cor.test(SEV_PROP, predSEV_PROP, method = "pearson")$estimate,
                                         by = FIRE_NAME][order(V1)] |>
                             tail(2))$FIRE_NAME |>
  as.character()

fires2mapLowAgreement <- (predictionsDT[, cor.test(SEV_PROP, predSEV_PROP, method = "pearson")$estimate,
                                        by = FIRE_NAME][order(V1)] |>
                            head(2))$FIRE_NAME |>
  as.character()


plotFun <- function(firePoints, var, fireID, varTitle) {
  fireID <- sub("_(obs|pred|p1|varY)", "", fireID)
  ggplot(firePoints[firePoints$FIRE_NAME == fireID]) +
    geom_spatvector(aes_string(colour = var)) +
    scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = -1,
                          limits = c(0,1)) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 1, angle = 20)) +
    labs(colour = "", x = "Longitude", y = "Latitude", 
         title = varTitle)
}

sevPlotsHighAgrement <- Map(f = plotFun,
                            fireID = as.vector(outer(fires2mapHighAgreement, 
                                                     c("_obs", "_pred", "_p1", "_varY"), paste0)),
                            var = rep(c("SEV_PROP", "predSEV_PROP", "p1", "varY"), each = 2),
                            varTitle = rep(c("Observed", "Predicted mean sev.", 
                                             "Predicted prob. of max. sev.", "Variance"),
                                           each = 2),
                            MoreArgs = list(firePoints = firePoints))

sevPlotsLowAgrement <- Map(f = plotFun,
                           fireID = as.vector(outer(fires2mapLowAgreement, 
                                                    c("_obs", "_pred", "_p1", "_varY"), paste0)),
                           var = rep(c("SEV_PROP", "predSEV_PROP", "p1", "varY"), each = 2),
                           varTitle = rep(c("Observed", "Predicted mean sev.", 
                                            "Predicted prob. of max. sev.", "Variance"),
                                          each = 2),
                           MoreArgs = list(firePoints = firePoints))

png(file.path(figDir, "severityMaps_highAgreement.png"), height = 8, width = 16,
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  ## line 1
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$BUFFALO_HEAD_obs + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$BUFFALO_HEAD_pred + theme(axis.title = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$BUFFALO_HEAD_p1 + theme(axis.title = element_blank()),
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$BUFFALO_HEAD_varY + theme(axis.title = element_blank()) + scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = -1),
  ## line 2
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$LIVOCK_obs, 
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$LIVOCK_pred + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$LIVOCK_p1 + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsHighAgrement$LIVOCK_varY + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()) + scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = -1), 
  align = "h",
  legend = "right", common.legend = FALSE, 
  labels = c("a)", "", "", "", "b)", "", "", ""), 
  ncol = 4, nrow = 2
)
dev.off()

png(file.path(figDir, "severityMaps_lowAgreement.png"), height = 8, width = 12,   
    units = "in", res = 300)
ggarrange(
  ## line 1
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$`CONTEST #2_obs` + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank()),
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$`CONTEST #2_pred` + theme(axis.title = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$`CONTEST #2_p1` + theme(axis.title = element_blank()),
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$`CONTEST #2_varY` + theme(axis.title = element_blank()) + scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = -1),
  ## line 2
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$WOODMAN_obs, 
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$WOODMAN_pred + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()), 
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$WOODMAN_p1 + theme(axis.title.y = element_blank()),
  sevPlotsLowAgrement$WOODMAN_varY + theme(axis.title = element_blank()) + scale_color_distiller(palette = "RdYlBu", direction = -1),
  align = "h",
  legend = "right", common.legend = FALSE, 
  labels = c("a)", "", "", "", "b)", "", "", ""),
  ncol = 4, nrow = 2
)
dev.off()
```


```{r saveLoadRdata, include = FALSE, eval = FALSE}
# save(list = c("plotData", grep("model", ls(), value = TRUE)),
#      # file = "/mnt/storage/cbarros/LandscapesInMotion/analyses/modelsGAMLSS_0-3Days_20m_goodSample_Nov1.RData")
#      # file = "/mnt/storage/cbarros/LandscapesInMotion/analyses/modelsGAMLSS_0-3Days_30m_goodSample_Nov1.RData")
#      file = "/media/data/cbarros/LandscapesInMotion/analyses/modelsGAMLSS_0-3Days_30m_goodSample_NgbSevApr21.RData")

## save to GDrive
# library(googledrive)
# save.image(file = "/mnt/storage/cbarros/LandscapesInMotion/analyses/LIM.RData")
# drive_auth(use_oob = TRUE)
# drive_upload("~/Downloads/LIM.RData", path = as_id("1jSrwbU83NVBosWFTxnv2JB2FVkiR5OLD"))

# load("analyses/modelsGAMLSS_0-3Days_goodSample_Nov1.RData")
```


## Accuracy values of similar studies

Fang et al. 2018 and Ferster et al. 2016 model severity using BRTs and multinomial logistic models, respectively. In Fang et al. 2018 only 3 severity classes were modelled. Ferster et al. 2016 used the same data as here.

Note that the contingency matrix in Fang et al. 2018 was transposed to match the format expected by `caret::confusionMatrix`.

```{r accuracyFangAndFerster}
FangEtAl2018_yr2000 <- data.frame(low = c(50, 26, 7),
                                  moderate = c(261, 496, 142),
                                  high = c(42, 369, 1184), 
                                  row.names = c("low", "moderate", "high")) |>
  as.matrix() |>
  as.table()


FangEtAl2018_yr2010 <- data.frame(low = c(196, 263, 94),
                                  moderate = c(95, 276, 115),
                                  high = c(33, 431, 662), 
                                  row.names = c("low", "moderate", "high")) |>
  as.matrix() |>
  as.table()


confusionMatrix(FangEtAl2018_yr2000)
confusionMatrix(FangEtAl2018_yr2010)
```
